channel.title: Home on Husenjan Hesenjan
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Husenjan Hesenjan

item.title: AZ-104 Review
item.description: This post is about my experience with studying and taking the AZ-104 certification.

item.title: OSCP Review
item.description: This post is about my experience with studying and taking OSCP certification.

item.title: Intel x86 Assembly
item.description: Learning x86 assembly on Windows 11/10/8 can be difficut for beginners; In this documentation I’ll go through setting up Netwide Assembler (NASM) on Windows and guide you through basics of x86 assembly.

item.title: Red Team
item.description: Methodology Enumerate TCP ports: # Quick TCP Scan rustscan -a "[IP]" # Aggressive Scan nmap -sV -sC -p "[PORTS]" "[IP]" -o nmap.

item.title: C++ Hooking Methods
item.description: Introduction Hooking in C++ is a technique that involves changing the program’s control flow by patching instruction bytes. Instead of executing the original function it will execute the hook function which is made by us.

item.title: Introduction
item.description: Welcome to documentation of my personal site. I’ll be releasing researches and cheat sheets on this section of my personal site.
